creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Sat Aug 25 04:25:12 2012
New Revision: 303113
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303113

Log:
  - Update to 0.4.3
  
  PR:		ports/170846
  Submitted by:	Jason Bacon <jwbacon@tds.net> (maintainer)
  Approved by:	eadler (mentor)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile
  head/sysutils/desktop-installer/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile	Sat Aug 25 04:23:23 2012	(r303112)
+++ head/sysutils/desktop-installer/Makefile	Sat Aug 25 04:25:12 2012	(r303113)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	desktop-installer
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.3
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://acadix.biz/Ports/distfiles/ \
 		http://personalpages.tds.net/~jwbacon/Ports/distfiles/
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ MASTER_SITES=	http://acadix.biz/Ports/di
 MAINTAINER=	jwbacon@tds.net
 COMMENT=	Quickly configure a FreeBSD desktop system
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	auto-append-line:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/auto-admin
+RUN_DEPENDS=	auto-admin>=0.3:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/auto-admin
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 

Modified: head/sysutils/desktop-installer/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/desktop-installer/distinfo	Sat Aug 25 04:23:23 2012	(r303112)
+++ head/sysutils/desktop-installer/distinfo	Sat Aug 25 04:25:12 2012	(r303113)

+SHA256 (desktop-installer-0.4.3.tar.gz) = 17f4d96a26cff1bed8369ac7da568147c4183e0836bf14f4d1c12700cc004c88
+SIZE (desktop-installer-0.4.3.tar.gz) = 267479
